description_long: This is a modern, metallic faucet with a cylindrical base and a single side-mounted lever handle for water control. The spout is a tall, curved gooseneck design, likely made of a flexible or jointed material, allowing for easy maneuvering and extended reach. The finish appears to be a combination of polished chrome or stainless steel for the body and a darker, possibly rubberized or coated material for the spout. The handle is ergonomically shaped for easy grip and operation. The faucet is designed for deck-mount installation, commonly found in kitchens, utility sinks, or public wash stations. Its sleek, minimalist appearance makes it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern gooseneck faucet with a cylindrical base and a single side lever, featuring a metallic finish and a flexible, dark-colored spout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical base, single side lever, and the straight-on profile of the tall, dark gooseneck spout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full curve of the gooseneck spout and the side-mounted lever handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cylindrical base and the straight alignment of the spout, with the handle visible on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the arch of the gooseneck spout and the absence of the handle on this side.
